name.description: REQUIRED. Quote name (also used as opportunity name when creating opportunity automatically). E.g. 'Q1 2026 Proposal'.

opportunityId.description: Existing Opportunity Id. Use this OR opportunityName when linking to an existing opportunity. Otherwise use accountId/accountName to create quote and have the system find pricebook and create opportunity automatically.

opportunityName.description: Existing opportunity name. Use this OR opportunityId. If not provided, use accountId/accountName to auto-create opportunity with pricebook.

accountId.description: Account Id when creating a new opportunity automatically. System will find pricebook, create opportunity with this account and pricebook, then create quote. Use accountId OR accountName.

accountName.description: Account name when creating a new opportunity automatically. System finds pricebook, creates opportunity, then creates quote.

closeDate.description: Close date for auto-created opportunity (YYYY-MM-DD). Default: 3 months from today.

stageName.description: Stage for auto-created opportunity. Default: Prospecting.

SBQQ__Primary__c.description: Mark as primary quote for the opportunity.

SBQQ__PriceBook__c.description: Override pricebook (otherwise uses standard/active when auto-creating opportunity).
